summary: Tested variant selector unified system on /shop/collection/Bluestone. CRITICAL BUG FOUND: Color/Finish auto-switch useEffects are overriding user clicks. When clicking a color that requires finish switch, the finish switches but color reverts. Same issue with finish clicks.

minor.issue: Two 500 errors in console during page load (unrelated to variant selection)

integration_issues.flow: COLOR ALWAYS CLICKABLE - Clicking color in other finish
integration_issues.issue: CRITICAL BUG: When clicking Beige from Grey+Polished, the finish auto-switches to Matt BUT the color reverts to Grey instead of staying on Beige. Product shows 'Bluestone Grey 60x60' instead of 'Bluestone Beige 60x60'
integration_issues.root_cause: useEffect at lines 524-527 (auto-switch color when finish changes) is firing AFTER the color click and reverting the color selection. The order of state updates causes a race condition.
integration_issues.expected_behavior: Click Beige → setSelectedColor('Beige') → useEffect switches finish to Matt → Beige stays selected
integration_issues.actual_behavior: Click Beige → setSelectedColor('Beige') → useEffect switches finish to Matt → useEffect at 524-527 checks availableColorsForFinish and somehow reverts to Grey

integration_issues.flow: FINISH ALWAYS CLICKABLE - Clicking finish in other color
integration_issues.issue: CRITICAL BUG: When clicking Polished from Beige+Matt, the color auto-switches to Grey BUT the finish stays on Matt instead of switching to Polished. Product shows 'Bluestone Grey 60x60' instead of 'Bluestone Grey 60x60 Polished'
integration_issues.root_cause: Same race condition - useEffect at lines 531-535 (auto-switch finish when color changes) is reverting the finish selection after the color auto-switches

action_items: FIX CRITICAL: The useEffects at lines 524-527 and 531-535 are causing race conditions. When user clicks a color/finish that triggers auto-switch, the clicked value should be preserved, not overwritten by the auto-switch useEffect.
SUGGESTED FIX: Add a flag or ref to track 'user-initiated' clicks vs 'auto-switch' changes. Only run auto-switch logic when the change was NOT user-initiated.
ALTERNATIVE FIX: Combine the color and finish selection into a single state update to avoid the race condition between multiple useEffects.
critical_code_review_comments: Lines 524-527: useEffect auto-switches color when finish changes - this is overriding user's color click when finish also needs to change
Lines 531-535: useEffect auto-switches finish when color changes - this is overriding user's finish click when color also needs to change
The two useEffects create a circular dependency that causes race conditions when both color AND finish need to change simultaneously
test_credentials: No auth needed for shop pages
context_for_next_testing_agent: CRITICAL BUG: Variant selector auto-switch is broken. When clicking a color that requires finish switch (e.g., Beige from Grey+Polished), the finish switches but color reverts. Same issue with finish clicks. Root cause is race condition between useEffects at lines 524-527 and 531-535. Visual states (opacity-50 for muted colors, dashed border for muted finishes) are correctly implemented. No 'Collection Not Found' errors observed.

1_color_always_clickable_beige.details: From Grey+Polished, clicked Beige. Finish switched to Matt but color reverted to Grey instead of Beige

2_color_always_clickable_white.details: From Grey+Polished, clicked White. Finish switched to Matt but color reverted to Grey, size stayed at 60x60cm

3_finish_always_clickable.details: From Beige+Matt, clicked Polished. Color switched to Grey but finish stayed on Matt

4_size_three_state_active.details: 60x60cm shows amber highlight when selected (active state)

5_size_three_state_disabled.details: 30x60cm and 60x120cm show disabled state (gray, cursor-not-allowed) when not available for Grey

6_size_muted_state.details: Grey has same size (60x60cm) in both Matt and Polished finishes, so no muted sizes exist for this color

7_product_title_updates.details: Product title updates correctly when clicking within same finish, but fails when auto-switch is triggered

8_no_collection_not_found.details: No 'Collection Not Found' error observed for any combination tested

9_visual_states_muted_colors.details: Beige and White show opacity-50 when Polished is selected (correctly indicating they're in other finish)

10_visual_states_muted_finishes.details: Polished shows dashed border when Beige is selected (correctly indicating it's in other color)

rca_of_the_issue.bug_description: Color/Finish auto-switch useEffects override user clicks
reproduction_steps: 4. Click Beige color (which only has Matt finish)
5. Observe: Finish switches to Matt, but color reverts to Grey instead of staying on Beige
rca_of_the_issue.root_cause: Two useEffects create a race condition: (1) useEffect at 531-535 detects Beige doesn't have Polished and switches finish to Matt, (2) useEffect at 524-527 then fires because finish changed, and since Grey is the first color in availableColorsForFinish for Matt, it switches color back to Grey
rca_of_the_issue.mitigation: Need to track whether the state change was user-initiated or auto-switch-initiated. Only run auto-switch logic for non-user-initiated changes.
